High lights: Info: Experience life above the ordinary at Altitude, Bendorewell, a premium residential address crafted for those who aspire higher. Altitude at Bendoorwell, Mangalore is a 31-storey premium residential project offering only 29 limited-edition luxury apartments. Designed for those who value exclusivity and sophistication, each residence provides spacious layouts, high-end finishes, and panoramic city views. Located in one of Mangalore's most sought-after neighbourhoods, Altitude combines elegant architecture, privacy, and world-class amenities to create an elevated living experience. With a grand entrance lobby, modern clubhouse, fitness zone, and secure parking, Altitude stands as a new benchmark for luxury apartments in Mangalore where urban convenience meets refined living.
Floor Plans: Typical Floor Plan: Typical Unit Plan
3D Floor Plan: Upper Ground Floor Plan

HIGHLIGHTS: Lower Ground Floor +Upper Ground Floor + 33 storey Apartment Building
Lower Ground consists of Car Parking, Commercial Spaces, Electrical Panel Room, Watchman room, General Toilets and Landscaped Area

Firefighting system in accordance to Fire Service Dept. Specifications & regulations.
Centralized Gas Bank and Reticulated Gas pipeline connections to Kitchens

Electronic Surveillance cameras in and around the building

Multi video door phone facility from security to each Apartment
Rain water harvesting system
Bore well / Open well water facility along with the corporation water connection

Tiled Flooring for common areas & staircase
Safety Railings for balconies and staircases

Premium quality antiskid Vitrified Tile flooring in terrace.

High lights: Info: BMK Sky Villa will be a premium-quality residential development situated in Vas Lane, one of the most elite residential localities in Mangalore City. COMMON AREAS AND FACILITIES: Commercial Building with Upper Ground Floor plus Four Floors and car parking at Lower Ground
plus Two Basement levels.
Entry Ramps down to Basements, toilets, lift, lobby, corridors, lift-rooms, electric rooms.
There will be a staircase leading to the premises on each floor.
Two nos of Automatic Elevators of 8 Passengers capacity with lift machine room.
Common lobby/corridors for all the premises on all the floors.
Separate General Toilet Facilities for ladies & Gents in all the Floors.
Every Shop fitted with rolling shutters with necessary locking arrangements.
Safety Railings for Passages & Staircase.
100% Generator Backup for Common Area Lightings, Services and inside the premises
Electrical provisions in Common Areas and Car parking Yard.
Separate electricity meter for recording electricity consumption.
One common electricity meter for water sump, for common lighting points at the entrance, at
staircase, landings and for lifts.
One common water meter for protected water supply provided by the Corporation.
Centralized CC Camera Network in common areas & Parking.
Covered Roof Top at Terrace.
Overhead tank on the top floor, which shall supply water to all the floors.
Solar provision for common area lighting.
Fire Protection System as per National Building Regulations.
Watchman’s room and servant’s toilet.
Common Car Parking in the Lower Ground plus two Basement Floors.
STRUCTURE (SHELL AND CORE): RCC frame structure with Column, Beam and Slab with high grade steel and A-1 quality of
9” thick Laterite stone masonry for External walls and 6” thick Laterite stone masonry for
Trovel finished neat plastering for internal ceiling and walls.
Internal surfaces covered with single coat plastering and Double coat plastering for External
Toilets are provided with sunken slabs with proper water proofing and concealed Pipelining.
PREMISES ENTRANCE AND VENTILATION: Structural glazing curtain walls and ACP cladding as per Elevation features.
FLOORING WORKS: Vitrified tile flooring for office space and shops.
Granite/Tile Flooring for Staircase and Common areas.
Designer Glazed Vitrified Tiles for wall surfaces in Toilets and Antiskid Tiles for flooring.
Interlock Paving or VDF Concrete Flooring for Driveway & Car parking Yard.
PAINTING WORKS: Acrylic Putty finished Internal emulsion to internal ceiling, walls and passage.
Exterior emulsion paint for external exposed surface of the building.
External painting to ceiling of parking area.
ELECTRICAL WORKS: Modular Electrical Switches & Premium Quality Wires and DB Fittings.
Nominal Electrical Points with DB provision inside the Premises.
Provision of air-conditioning for all office/shop premises.
Provision of 5 KW power for shops having area within 1000 sq.mtrs. and from 1000 sq.mtrs to
OTHER GENERAL FEATURES: Premium Quality CP Plumbing Fittings in Toilets.
Premium Quality Sanitary Wares in Toilets.
UPVC Frames with Fibrotech Shutters for Toilet Doors with Quality Fixtures.
RCC underground sump and RCC overhead tank at terrace
Bore well/ Corporation water connection facility.
Provision of Waterline & Sewage line for each shop.
Provision of STP Tank and Equipments.
One D.G. set with soundproof enclosure.
